name: Veal Scallops Sauteed with Spinach & Capers
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the veal with a thin film of olive oil (2 teaspoons total) and pound between 2 sheets of waxed or parchment paper until 1/8 inch thick.
2. Heat the remaining oil in a heavy skillet. When the oil begins to smoke, add the veal and sauté for 1 minute on each side, until browned and cooked through. Remove to a platter and keep warm.
3. Deglaze the pan with the chicken stock. Boil until reduced to 1/3 cup.
4. Add the spinach and cook until the spinach wilts. Pour over the veal.
5. Add the capers and lemon juice to the pan and cook for 30 seconds. Scatter over the veal and spinach.
PER SERVING: 195 calories, 26 g protein, 2 g carbohydrate, 9 g fat (2 g saturated), 89 mg cholesterol, 182 mg sodium, 1 g fiber.
